section.heading: Issuance of rules

content.p: The Administrator shall issue rules to carry out this subchapter, including rules that establish procedures and methods for making grants and contracts, and distributing funds available, to carry out this subchapter.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 93–415, title II, § 299I, as added Pub. L. 107–273, div. C, title II, § 12219, Nov. 2, 2002, 116 Stat. 1893.)

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 5680 of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective on the first day of the first fiscal year that begins after Nov. 2, 2002, and applicable only with respect to fiscal years beginning on or after the first day of the first fiscal year that begins after Nov. 2, 2002, see section 12223 of Pub. L. 107–273, set out as an Effective Date of 2002 Amendment note under section 11101 of this title.
